label: 随机矩形区域生成
description: 在输入网格的指定区域内随机生成不重叠矩形，填充值自动从网格最大值+1起递增，每个矩形独立ID
description-en: Randomly places non-overlapping axis-aligned rectangles within the target area; fill values auto-increment from grid max+1, giving each rectangle a unique ID.
icon: 深色网格底面上散落若干大小不一的白色实心矩形块，矩形严格对齐网格且只出现在有效区域内，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入的二维网格或网格列表，支持单个网格（number[][]）或网格列表（number[][][]），支持二值或多值网格
inputs.description-en: Input 2D grid or list of grids; supports single grid or grid list, binary or multi-value.

inputs.name: targetValue
inputs.label: 目标区域值
inputs.description: 矩形只会放置在等于该值的格内。0 表示任意非零格（二值模式）；填非零值时精确匹配该掩码ID（支持异形区域）
inputs.description-en: Rectangles are only placed in cells equal to this value. 0 means any non-zero cell (binary mode); non-zero means exact mask ID matching.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 矩形数量
inputs.description: 要生成的矩形总数（实际放置数量可能因区域不足而少于此值）
inputs.description-en: Target number of rectangles to place; actual count may be less if space is insufficient.

inputs.name: minSize
inputs.label: 最小宽高
inputs.description: 矩形宽和高的最小值（格数），宽高各自独立随机，共用此下限
inputs.description-en: Minimum size for both width and height (in cells); width and height are sampled independently within [minSize, maxSize].

inputs.name: maxSize
inputs.label: 最大宽高
inputs.description: 矩形宽和高的最大值（格数）
inputs.description-en: Maximum size for both width and height (in cells).

inputs.name: minDistance
inputs.label: 最小距离
inputs.description: 相邻矩形最近边之间的最小格数间距，0 表示允许紧靠（但不重叠）
inputs.description-en: Minimum gap (in cells) between the nearest edges of any two placed rectangles; 0 allows touching.

inputs.name: dispersion
inputs.label: 离散程度
inputs.description: 0=随机集中，1=尽量分散。越大时新矩形越倾向于放置在远离已有矩形的位置，仍禁止重叠
inputs.description-en: 0 = random/clustered, 1 = maximally dispersed. Higher values bias new rectangles toward positions far from existing ones; non-overlap rule still applies.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 表示使用当前时间自动随机
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses current timestamp for randomness.

inputs.name: merge
inputs.label: 输出合并
inputs.description: 默认开启，将所有地块叠加为一张 01 网格输出，名称清单合并为单条地块条目（id=1）；关闭后保持每个地块独立单值网格的列表格式
inputs.description-en: Enabled by default: merges all parcels into a single 01 grid and collapses the name list to a single 'parcel' entry (id=1). When disabled, outputs one single-value grid per parcel.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 地块网格列表
outputs.description: 合并模式：包含一张 01 网格的列表（所有地块叠加，有地块的格子值为 1）；非合并模式：单值网格列表，每张网格只含一个地块
outputs.description-en: Merge mode: single-element list with a 01 grid (all parcels merged, parcel cells = 1). Non-merge mode: one single-value grid per parcel.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 合并模式：单条 {id:1, name:'地块', type:'tile'}；非合并模式：地块名称清单，格式 [{id, name:'地块 N', type:'tile'}]，与 outputGridList 顺序一致
outputs.description-en: Merge mode: single entry {id:1, name:'parcel', type:'tile'}. Non-merge mode: parcel name list [{id, name:'地块 N', type:'tile'}], aligned with outputGridList.

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 实际放置数量
outputs.description: 成功放置的矩形数量（可能小于目标数量）
outputs.description-en: Number of rectangles successfully placed (may be less than count).
